description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CUDA Release Build that triggers on pull requests to main, pushes to main, and manual workflow dispatches. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on an amazonlinux:2023 container on a linux.24xlarge host, building FBGEMM_GPU for multiple Python and CUDA versions. The test_and_publish_artifact job runs on a linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu host with a CUDA container, testing the built artifact and pushing it to PyPI for specific CUDA versions.
